arts.ttl: Why Tottenham are wearing away kit at Arsenal as Premier League breaks tradition
arts.sum: Spurs have been forced to switch colours for the North London derby at the Emirates

arts.ttl: Riccardo Calafiori's unique nickname as Arsenal star makes telling Mikel Arteta admission
arts.sum: Nearly six months after moving to Emirates Stadium, the defender has revealed Mikel Arteta was a major reason why he wanted to join the Gunners. Arsenal defender Riccardo Calafiori has revealed why he was so keen to join Arsenal in the summer.

arts.ttl: Dusan Vlahovic stance on Arsenal transfer as Juventus offer and contract talks revealed
arts.sum: This time next year, clubs from overseas, like Arsenal, will be eligible to open pre-contract talks with the striker over a free transfer in the summer of 2026 – unless he signs a new contract beforehand. Vlahovic, who sees his contract at the Allianz Stadium expire in June 2026, has featured 16 times for Juventus in the Serie A this season, scoring seven goals and providing one assist .

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard reveals what Arsenal must do to beat Tottenham amid North London Derby challenge
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard has insisted Arsenal still have a "lot to play for" between now and the end of the season, with the Gunners captain warning his teammates of Tottenham's quality ahead of Wednesday evening's North London Derby. Ahead of the second North London Derby of the season, Odegaard has opened up on what went wrong against Man Utd on Sunday and has looked ahead to the clash against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Tottenham - TV channel, live stream and kick off time
arts.sum: Tonight's game has plenty on the line for both teams with Arsenal looking to close the gap on Liverpool at the top of the Premier League while Tottenham need to start picking up points if they are to secure European football. Midweek Premier League is back this week, with all 20 teams in action including Arsenal v Spurs and Forest v Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham could now sign Copa America finalist with £84m release clause for less than £20m
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have already made one signing in the January transfer window and more could follow in the next two weeks. Tottenham want three more...

arts.ttl: The Dusan Vlahovic to Arsenal conspiracy theory
arts.sum: They believe that Juventus have made the decision to sell Vlahovic this month and don't want to risk an injury to him. Dusan Vlahovic has missed Juventus ' last two games due to injury but there are those who believe there is more to the story.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Tottenham - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Mikel Arteta's men host bitter rivals in North London Derby plus action from the other Wednesday night league fixtures
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest live score, team news and updates from Arsenal vs Tottenham, Newcastle vs Wolves, Everton vs Aston Villa and Leicester City vs Crystal Palace.

arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham face off in the north London derby on Wednesday evening in what is a must-win game for both sides. Arsenal want to...

arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United are interested in signing the Tottenham target too ⚔️
